subject: [PATCH v4 20/21] swapfile: replace the swap map with bitmaps

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: No comment provided by David Hildenbrand in the initial message.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch replaces the swap map in Linux's virtual memory management system with two bitmaps, one for tracking allocated states and another for bad states. This change is motivated by the fact that each swap map entry now only has three possible states: free, allocated, and bad. By using bitmaps, the code saves 6 bits per swap entry.
